dataset.title: GBIF Occurrence Download 0008347-260519110011954
dataset.abstract: A dataset containing all occurrences available in GBIF matching the query: { "and" : [ "Continent is Europe", "OccurrenceStatus is Present", "TaxonKey is Sphagnopsida" ] } The dataset includes records from the following constituent datasets.
